text: BTC pushing $71K pre-market. ETF flow data out in 2h. Watch the 6-day streak.
ETF numbers: +$2.1B net over 6 sessions. Longest inflow run of Q2. Full brief incoming.
Tether minted $3B USDT in 48h. Largest single-week issuance on record. Preceded the move by 18h as usual.
SOL DEX vol: $48B in May vs ETH $41B. Third month in a row. Lower fees doing the work.
Fed holds. Powell: two cuts still possible if PCE cooperates. Yields -3bps on the 2y. Risk flat.
Coinbase perp OI +44% last week to $9.2B. Retail is back. Institutional share of volume actually dropped.
GBTC at +0.3% premium to NAV. First time since the ETF conversion. Forced sellers finally done.
Ripple won. XRP relisted on CB/Kraken/Gemini within 6h. +38% spike, retraced to +22%. Long legal overhang finally gone.
